entry.title: Between language and identity: discursive constructions of intergenerational transmission among urban Circassians in Türkiye
entry.summary: Authors: Yasemin Oral-Saribaş, Murat Topçu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2025-0203 Pages: Page range: 437-463

entry.title: When expectations meet realities: discursive negotiation of family language policy in a transnational Chinese heritage family
entry.summary: Authors: Changchun Li, Claudia Vallejo Rubinstein, Melinda Dooly DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2026-0004 Pages: Page range: 465-487

entry.title: Chronicles of change and layered transformation: a contextualized and historicized approach to Antwerp and Brussels’ Chinatowns
entry.summary: Authors: Rui Guo, Mieke Vandenbroucke, Rik Vosters DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2025-0195 Pages: Page range: 489-519

entry.title: Complicity, resistance, and agency: the ambiguous discursive position of a Faroese tour guide
entry.summary: Authors: Hanna Birkelund Nilsson, Marie Maegaard DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/multi-2025-0142 Pages: Page range: 521-543
